name: inline-scribe
description: Chrome extension that proofreads what you write in the browser using a local AI (Ollama). Accept or reject each fix one by one. Nothing leaves your machine.

scripts.check: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.zip: npm run build && cd dist && rm -f ../inline-scribe.zip && zip -qr ../inline-scribe.zip . && cd .. && echo 'inline-scribe.zip ready for the Chrome Web Store'
